## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`pytest` passes locally)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]` (skip for docs-only / internal-refactor PRs)
- [ ] README / docs updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] PR scope is focused — one feature or fix
